appraisal_events.evidence: « Chez cet homme si insignifiant, si commun, il y avait… la sorte de grandeur d’un général… [qui] conclut pour ce qui militairement est le plus sage et dit : “Faites face à l’Est.” »
appraisal_events.explanation: In the decisive moment when he decides on morphine, Cottard is compared to a great strategist, which elevates him clearly above his ordinary presentation.

status_effects.explanation: His clinical judgment in a critical situation is posed as wise and great, which significantly enhances his local esteem.
